metadata.description: Ship better code with AI. Production-quality skills for clean code, testing, debugging, PR review, and more.

plugins.name: ship-clean-code
plugins.description: Apply clean code principles when writing or reviewing production-quality Python, TypeScript/JavaScript, or Java code. Covers naming, functions, classes, error handling, testing, formatting, and 66 cataloged code smells.

plugins.name: ship-tested-code
plugins.description: Apply testing best practices when writing or reviewing tests for Python, TypeScript/JavaScript, or Java code. Covers test design, TDD, test strategy, mocking, integration testing, flaky test management, and 49 cataloged test smells.

plugins.name: ship-debugged-code
plugins.description: Apply systematic debugging practices when investigating, isolating, or fixing bugs in Python, TypeScript/JavaScript, or Java code. Covers reproduction, hypothesis-driven investigation, bisection, root-cause analysis, observability, regression-test design, and postmortems.

plugins.name: ship-reviewed-prs
plugins.description: Multi-persona pull-request review (senior engineer, senior security, senior infra/SRE, senior data engineer, test-coverage signal) with comment-lifecycle suppression and decisive APPROVE/REQUEST_CHANGES/COMMENT submission. Runs locally with confirmation gating and in CI fully automated. Composes with the other ship-* skills via delegation.
